title: Minimum Cost to Make at Least One Valid Path in a Grid
titleCn: 使网格图至少有一条有效路径的最小代价

testcases.input: grid = [[1,1,1,1],[2,2,2,2],[1,1,1,1],[2,2,2,2]] Output: 3 Explanation: You will start at point (0, 0). The path to (3, 3) is as follows. (0, 0) --> (0, 1) --> (0, 2) --> (0, 3) change the arrow to down with cost = 1 --> (1, 3) --> (1, 2) --> (1, 1) --> (1, 0) change the arrow to down with cost = 1 --> (2, 0) --> (2, 1) --> (2, 2) --> (2, 3) change the arrow to down with cost = 1 --> (3, 3) The total cost = 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: You will start at point (0, 0). The path to (3, 3) is as follows. (0, 0) --> (0, 1) --> (0, 2) --> (0, 3) change the arrow to down with cost = 1 --> (1, 3) --> (1, 2) --> (1, 1) --> (1, 0) change the arrow to down with cost = 1 --> (2, 0) --> (2, 1) --> (2, 2) --> (2, 3) change the arrow to down with cost = 1 --> (3, 3) The total cost = 3.

testcases.input: grid = [[1,1,3],[3,2,2],[1,1,4]] Output: 0 Explanation: You can follow the path from (0, 0) to (2, 2).
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: You can follow the path from (0, 0) to (2, 2).
